note: Hand-curated PLAYER-KIT overlay: defensive cooldowns + tank active-mitigation buffs, keyed by spellId. These are PLAYER spells not in the MDT enemy seed. ENEMY mechanics (avoidable / interrupt-priority / dispel-priority / dangerous debuffs) now live in curation/mechanics/<dungeon>.json as consolidated mechanic cards — edit those, not this file.

fields.activeMitigation: bool — tank active-mitigation buff (Ironfur/Shield Block/etc). Default false.
fields.defensive: object — a PLAYER defensive cooldown. { name, class?, spec?, type: 'personal'|'external'|'raid'|'tank'|'aura', cooldownSeconds?, durationSeconds?, description? }.

defensive.description: Counts as mitigation only when Translucent Image is selected.
defensive.name: Fade

defensive.description: Full immunity. Applies Forbearance.
defensive.name: Divine Shield

defensive.description: Major all-damage reduction cooldown.
defensive.name: Shield Wall

defensive.description: Physical-damage immunity that can be self-cast or cast on an ally. Applies Forbearance.
defensive.name: Blessing of Protection

defensive.description: Affected nearby enemies deal reduced damage to the Warrior. Talents can reduce the cooldown.
defensive.name: Demoralizing Shout

defensive.description: Short-cooldown AoE damage reduction.
defensive.name: Feint

defensive.description: Rotational melee block coverage. Has 2 charges; recharge is reduced by haste.
defensive.name: Shield Block

defensive.description: Strong avoidance cooldown while facing the attacker. Talent-dependent.
defensive.name: Evasion

defensive.description: Transfers a portion of an ally's incoming damage to the Paladin.
defensive.name: Blessing of Sacrifice

defensive.description: Absorb shield. Ends early when depleted.
defensive.name: Ice Barrier

defensive.description: Effective-health cooldown that increases maximum health and heals for the same amount.
defensive.name: Last Stand

defensive.description: Short all-damage reduction cooldown.
defensive.name: Barkskin

defensive.description: Reflects the first reflectable spell and provides short magic mitigation. Talent-dependent.
defensive.name: Spell Reflection

defensive.description: Removes many harmful non-physical effects and causes most spells to miss. Talent-dependent.
defensive.name: Cloak of Shadows

defensive.description: Group mitigation amplifier when used with Devotion Aura.
defensive.name: Aura Mastery

defensive.description: Major single-target damage reduction. Can be self-cast.
defensive.name: Pain Suppression

defensive.description: Full immunity while encased. Mutually exclusive with Ice Cold when that choice talent is selected.
defensive.name: Ice Block

defensive.description: Major personal damage reduction.
defensive.name: Dispersion

defensive.description: Magic absorb and harmful magic effect prevention.
defensive.name: Anti-Magic Shell

defensive.description: Major all-damage reduction and stun immunity. Talent-dependent for some specs.
defensive.name: Icebound Fortitude

defensive.description: Defensive-offensive cooldown that increases parry and copies abilities.
defensive.name: Dancing Rune Weapon

defensive.description: Rotational mitigation spender. Costs Runic Power, heals the Death Knight, and generates Blood Shield.
defensive.name: Death Strike

defensive.description: Group magic-damage mitigation zone. Talent-dependent.
defensive.name: Anti-Magic Zone

defensive.description: Rotational Holy Power spender. Track armor buff 132403 for mitigation uptime.
defensive.name: Shield of the Righteous

defensive.description: Effective-health cooldown that increases maximum health and healing or absorbs received.
defensive.name: Vampiric Blood

defensive.description: Major all-damage reduction. Baseline for Guardian and talent-dependent for other specs; charges may vary by talents.
defensive.name: Survival Instincts

defensive.description: Group damage reduction while standing within the barrier.
defensive.name: Power Word: Barrier

defensive.description: Physical-damage absorb aura generated by Death Strike. Track separately from the Death Strike cast.
defensive.name: Blood Shield

defensive.description: Major all-damage reduction cooldown. Talent-dependent.
defensive.name: Guardian of Ancient Kings

defensive.description: Group effective-health cooldown that grants temporary maximum health.
defensive.name: Rallying Cry

defensive.description: Group damage smoothing through health redistribution, with mitigation while inside the area.
defensive.name: Spirit Link Totem

defensive.description: Single-target external damage reduction. Talent-dependent.
defensive.name: Ironbark

defensive.description: Damage reduction plus interrupt and silence immunity.
defensive.name: Unending Resolve

defensive.description: Major all-damage reduction. Talent-dependent.
defensive.name: Astral Shift

defensive.description: Sacrifices current health to generate an absorb shield. Ends early when depleted.
defensive.name: Dark Pact

defensive.description: Maximum-health and damage-reduction cooldown. Mistweaver and Brewmaster have spec-specific or rotational cooldown reductions; Windwalker access is talent-dependent.
defensive.name: Fortifying Brew

defensive.description: Large single-target absorb. Ends early when depleted. Talent-dependent.
defensive.name: Life Cocoon

defensive.description: Damage reduction plus parry.
defensive.name: Die by the Sword

defensive.description: Instantly clears a portion of current Stagger damage. Has 2 charges; recharge is affected by haste and rotational reductions.
defensive.name: Purifying Brew

defensive.description: Absorbs damage and redirects a portion to the target.
defensive.name: Touch of Karma

defensive.description: Armor buff generated by Shield of the Righteous cast 53600. Use this aura for mitigation uptime tracking.
defensive.name: Shield of the Righteous

defensive.description: Damage reduction plus enhanced Bloodthirst healing.
defensive.name: Enraged Regeneration

defensive.description: Triggered absorb aura cast by Divine Protection when the Shield of Vengeance talent is selected.
defensive.name: Shield of Vengeance

defensive.description: Deflects attacks and reduces damage taken. Prevents attacking during the effect.
defensive.name: Aspect of the Turtle

defensive.description: Defensive transformation that increases current health, maximum health, and armor.
defensive.name: Metamorphosis

defensive.description: Absorbs part of incoming damage. Rotational mitigation for Protection and talent-dependent for DPS specs. Costs Rage.
defensive.name: Ignore Pain

defensive.description: Rotational stackable armor mitigation. Costs Rage. Can also appear from situational off-spec Bear Form usage.
defensive.name: Ironfur

defensive.description: Stacking armor buff generated by Marrowrend (cast 195182). Rotational mitigation maintained near-100% uptime; gaps are the signal.
defensive.name: Bone Shield

defensive.description: Area defensive that gives nearby allies a chance to avoid incoming damage. Talent-dependent.
defensive.name: Darkness

defensive.description: Personal damage reduction and avoidance cooldown. Netherwalk can modify this with a brief immunity.
defensive.name: Blur

defensive.description: Rotational armor and parry mitigation. Has 2 charges; recharge is reduced by haste.
defensive.name: Demon Spikes

defensive.description: Cast event for the damage-reduction brand. Track target debuff 207771 for coverage where present.
defensive.name: Fiery Brand

defensive.description: Target-side Fiery Brand mitigation debuff. Companion log aura for cast spell 204021.
defensive.name: Fiery Brand

defensive.description: Absorb shield. Ends early when depleted.
defensive.name: Blazing Barrier

defensive.description: Absorb shield plus magic-damage reduction. Ends early when depleted.
defensive.name: Prismatic Barrier

defensive.description: All-damage reduction for the Hunter and pet. Talent-dependent.
defensive.name: Survival of the Fittest

defensive.description: Absorb shield. Ends early when depleted. Choice-node alternative to Celestial Infusion.
defensive.name: Celestial Brew

defensive.description: External smoothing cooldown that delays a portion of an ally's incoming damage.
defensive.name: Time Dilation

defensive.description: Personal all-damage reduction. Obsidian Bulwark can add a second charge.
defensive.name: Obsidian Scales

defensive.description: Reduces AoE damage taken by the Evoker and nearby allies. Talent-dependent.
defensive.name: Zephyr

defensive.description: Toggle stance that provides sustained mitigation at an offensive cost. Lasts until toggled off.
defensive.name: Defensive Stance

defensive.description: Nearby affected enemies deal reduced damage to the Paladin. Talent-dependent.
defensive.name: Eye of Tyr

defensive.description: Effective-health and mitigation cooldown. Talent-dependent.
defensive.name: Sentinel

defensive.description: Allows the Warrior to block spells. Talent-dependent.
defensive.name: Spell Block

defensive.description: Personal all-damage reduction. Retribution can talent Shield of Vengeance to add a triggered absorb.
defensive.name: Divine Protection

defensive.description: Triggered Aura Mastery buff companion to cast spell 31821.
defensive.name: Aura Mastery

defensive.description: Choice-node replacement for Ice Block. Talent-dependent.
defensive.name: Ice Cold

defensive.description: Applies the appropriate Mage barrier to the Mage and nearby allies. Shields can end early when depleted.
defensive.name: Mass Barrier

defensive.description: All-damage reduction plus cheat-death effect during the window.
defensive.name: Ardent Defender

defensive.description: Partial absorb shield. Ends early when depleted. Choice-node alternative to Celestial Brew.
defensive.name: Celestial Infusion
